name: wispr-flow
title: Wispr Flow
description: Search transcription history, manage your custom dictionary, and control voice recording with Wispr Flow
author: carterm

preferences.name: primaryAction
preferences.title: Primary Action
preferences.description: The default action when pressing Enter on a transcript

preferences.name: showArchived
preferences.title: Show Archived
preferences.label: Include archived transcripts
preferences.description: Include archived transcripts in the list

preferences.name: minimumDuration
preferences.title: Minimum Duration
preferences.description: Hide transcripts shorter than this duration (in seconds). Useful for filtering out accidental triggers.

preferences.name: confirmBeforeArchive
preferences.title: Confirm Before Archive
preferences.label: Show confirmation dialog before archiving
preferences.description: Show a confirmation dialog before archiving a transcript

preferences.name: databasePath
preferences.title: Database Path
preferences.description: Custom path to the Wispr Flow database file. Leave empty to use the default location.

commands.name: search-transcripts
commands.title: Search Transcripts
commands.subtitle: Wispr Flow
commands.description: Search and browse your Wispr Flow transcription history

commands.name: add-word
commands.title: Add Word to Dictionary
commands.subtitle: Wispr Flow
commands.description: Add a word or phrase to your Wispr Flow custom vocabulary

commands.name: manage-dictionary
commands.title: Manage Dictionary
commands.subtitle: Wispr Flow
commands.description: View, search, edit, and delete words in your Wispr Flow dictionary
